title: hephaestus-panel01-nb2anchor
prompt: You are given two reference images. IMAGE 1 is the rough composition for this shot — keep its framing and staging. IMAGE 2 is the STYLE ANCHOR — match its exact painterly concept-art style, palette, and brushwork (this keeps the whole shot-set consistent). Render this as ONE finished full-frame cinematic image: wide establishing shot of the cavernous forge, the long line of gold automata receding to a vanishing point, the bearded blond smith small at his station lower left. No grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact painterly cinematic concept-art style, palette, color, and rendering of the style-anchor reference — cool electric blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze, visible brushwork.
